description: You are the Senior Clinical Data Manager for the Phase II Diabetes Trial (DM-TRIAL-2024). In OpenClinica (login: root / Admin123!, active study: Phase II Diabetes Trial), create a dataset named 'IDMC_Weekly_Safety' that includes all available CRFs and items for the study. Schedule this dataset to be exported in Tab-delimited format every Monday with the job name 'IDMC_Monday_Extract'.
